seo.title: Referral Program | Earn Recurring Commission | JobCapturePro
seo.meta_description: Join the JobCapturePro referral program. Earn 20% recurring commission for 12 months when you refer contractors and home service businesses.

hero.h1: Earn Recurring Commissions by Helping Contractors Turn Real Jobs Into Real Marketing
hero.subheadline: JobCapturePro helps contractors turn completed jobs, photos, reviews, and project proof into better online visibility — without adding a bunch of manual work. Refer contractors, remodelers, and home service businesses to JCP and earn recurring commission when they become customers.

what_it_is.headline: Why This Is Exciting
what_it_is.subheadline: Most contractors are already sitting on a goldmine of marketing proof.
team_already: They do real work in real neighborhoods
what_it_is.lead: But most of that proof never turns into anything useful online. JobCapturePro fixes that.
what_it_is.closing: If you know contractors, remodelers, or home service companies, this is an easy product to recommend.

how_it_works.headline: How It Works
how_it_works.subheadline: Three simple steps to start earning

steps.title: Join the program
lines: Sign up for the JobCapturePro referral program and get your unique referral link.

steps.title: Share JobCapturePro
lines: Send your link to contractors, remodelers, agencies, or home service businesses that could use more online proof from the work they already do.

steps.title: Earn commission
lines: When someone you refer becomes a paid JobCapturePro customer, you earn 20% recurring commission for 12 months.

check_ins.headline: Who Should You Refer?
check_ins.subheadline: JobCapturePro is a strong fit for:
check_ins.closing: If they already take job photos but those photos are not turning into website content, Google proof, reviews, or local visibility, they should probably see JobCapturePro.

benefits.headline: What JobCapturePro Helps Contractors Do

items.title: Capture completed jobs from the field
items.body: Turn real work into assets you can publish

items.title: Turn job photos into online proof
items.body: Show homeowners the work you actually do

items.title: Publish SEO-friendly check-ins to their website
items.body: Fresh local content without manual writing

items.title: Create fresh local content
items.body: Stay visible in the neighborhoods you serve

items.title: Request more reviews
items.body: Right after the job while experience is fresh

items.title: Build more trust with homeowners
items.body: Real proof beats generic marketing claims

items.title: Show real work in real service areas
items.body: Local credibility that generic sites cannot fake

items.title: Look active, credible, and established online
items.body: A company that looks busy wins more trust

benefits.closing: This is not generic marketing software. It is built specifically for contractors and home service companies that want their real-world work to actually show up online.

commission.headline: Commission Details
commission.body: Earn 20% recurring commission for 12 months for each referred customer who signs up for a paid JobCapturePro account.
commission.footnote: Commissions are paid according to program terms and only apply to active paid customers.

partners.headline: For Agencies, Consultants, and Strategic Partners
partners.body: Run an agency? Work with contractors? Manage SEO, websites, ads, CRM, or marketing for home service businesses? You may be a great fit for a deeper JobCapturePro partnership. Agencies and consultants may qualify for enhanced partner terms based on fit, volume, and level of involvement. Apply through the referral program and tell us how you plan to promote or use JobCapturePro with your clients.

share.headline: Easy Ways to Share JCP
share.body: You do not need a complicated pitch. Here is a simple message you can send:
share.quote: Thought you might want to check this out. JobCapturePro helps contractors turn completed jobs, photos, reviews, and real project proof into better online visibility without adding a bunch of manual work.
share.note: You can also send people to the demo page first so they can quickly see what JCP does and who it is for.

items.a: You earn 20% recurring commission for 12 months for each referred customer who signs up for a paid JobCapturePro account.
Contractors, remodelers, home service companies, and agencies that work with those businesses.

items.q: Do I need to be a JobCapturePro customer?
items.a: No. You do not need to be a customer to join the referral program.
Yes. Agencies, consultants, web designers, local SEO providers, and contractor marketing partners are welcome to apply.
Paid ads require approval. Please do not bid on JobCapturePro branded terms or run misleading promotions.

items.q: Can I promise rankings or results?
items.a: No. Please do not guarantee SEO rankings, Google Maps rankings, leads, or revenue. JobCapturePro helps contractors create better proof and visibility assets, but results vary.

items.q: Where do I get my referral link?
items.a: After you join, you will get access to your referral dashboard where you can grab your link, track clicks, view referrals, and monitor commissions.

final_cta.headline: Ready to Start Referring Contractors?
final_cta.subheadline: Join the JobCapturePro referral program and start earning recurring commission by helping contractors turn real completed jobs into real online proof.
final_cta.cta_note: 20% recurring commission for 12 months on paid referrals.
